taxonomy: Leptochilus evrardii is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The classification of Leptochilus evrardii is as follows: Kingdom - Plantae, Phylum - Pteridophyta, Class - Polypodiopsida, Order - Polypodiales, Family - Blechnaceae. This species is also known as the Evrard's chain fern. Its classification is closely related to other species within the Blechnaceae family.
